Command.Name: allenbradleycontrollogixethernet
Command.Description: Creates an Allen-Bradley ControlLogix Ethernet channel (if not exists).

Option.Description: Indicates whether or not to make the channel's diagnostic information available to an OPC application.
Requested Description
Requested Name
Specify the name of a network adapter to bind or allow the OS to select the default
Sets the NonNormalizedFloatingPointHandling. Valid values are: ReplaceWithZero (default), Unmodified
Sets the OptimizationMethod. Valid values are: WriteAllValuesForAllTags, WriteOnlyLatestValueForNonBooleanTags, WriteOnlyLatestValueForAllTags (default)
Password for Kepware server configuration endpoint
Server Url for Kepserver configuration endpoint
UserName for Kepware server configuration endpoint
Use verbose for more debug/trace information
Specifies the ratio of write operations to read operations, based on one read per configurable number of writes.

Requested Name

Sets the OptimizationMethod. Valid values are: WriteAllValuesForAllTags, WriteOnlyLatestValueForNonBooleanTags, WriteOnlyLatestValueForAllTags (default)
Password for Kepware server configuration endpoint
TCP/IP and UDP port for EtherNet/IP communication (1-65535)
Server Url for Kepserver configuration endpoint
UserName for Kepware server configuration endpoint
Use verbose for more debug/trace information
Specifies the ratio of write operations to read operations, based on one read per configurable number of writes.

Command.Name: allenbradleycontrollogixethernet
Command.Description: Creates an Allen-Bradley ControlLogix Ethernet device (if not exists).

Option.Description: Sets the array block size. Valid values are: Elements30, Elements60, Elements120 (default), Elements240, Elements480, Elements960, Elements1920, Elements3840
ChannelName
Specify the maximum number of bytes available on the CIP connection (500-4000, default: 500)
Requested Description
The device ID in format: <IP or Hostname>,1,[<Optional Routing Path>],<CPU Slot> (e.g., '192.168.1.1,1,0')
DeviceName
Sets the inactivity watchdog timeout. Valid values are: Seconds8, Seconds16, Seconds32 (default), Seconds64, Seconds128

Sets the device model. Valid values are: ControlLogix5500 (default), CompactLogix5300, FlexLogix5400, SoftLogix5800, DhPlusGatewayPlc5, DhPlusGatewaySlc504, ControlNetGatewayPlc5C, EipGatewayMicroLogix, EipGatewaySlcFixed, EipGatewaySlcModular, EipGatewayPlc5, SerialGatewayControlLogix, SerialGatewayCompactLogix, SerialGatewayFlexLogix, SerialGatewaySoftLogix, EniControlLogix5500, EniCompactLogix5300, EniFlexLogix5400, EniMicroLogix, EniSlc500FixedIO, EniSlc500ModularIO, EniPlc5, MicroLogix1100, MicroLogix1400
Password for Kepware server configuration endpoint
Specify the EtherNet/IP port on the target device (default: 44818)
Sets the protocol mode. Valid values are: Symbolic, LogicalNonBlocking (default), LogicalBlocking
Server Url for Kepserver configuration endpoint
Synchronize with the controller after an offline edit or download (default: true)
Synchronize with the controller after an online edit or download (default: true)
UserName for Kepware server configuration endpoint
Use verbose for more debug/trace information
